title: Orthosia melantha
taxonomy: Orthosia melantha is a species of moth in the family Noctuidae. It belongs to the genus Orthosia, which includes several species of moths. The genus Orthosia is part of the subfamily Xyleninae, which is a group of noctuid moths. These moths are typically nocturnal, meaning they are active at night, and are found in various parts of the world. The classification of Orthosia melantha is further detailed in the Linnaean system of taxonomy.
